title: Follow-up to the report on persistent organic pollutants in stockpiles, products and articles in use and in wastes and consideration of ways of enhancing the submission of information pursuant to Annex F to the Stockholm Convention
text:
The Persistent Organic Pollutants Review Committee
 1. Takes note of the additional information on the follow-up to the report on persistent organic pollutants in stockpiles, products and articles in use and in wastes and on ways of enhancing the submission of information specified in Annex F to the Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants;
summary:
The Persistent Organic Pollutants Review Committee
 1. Takes note of the additional information on the follow-up to the report on persistent organic pollutants in stockpiles, products and articles in use and in wastes and on ways of enhancing the submission of information specified in Annex F to the Stockholm Convention on Persistent Organic Pollutants;
meeting_title: 21st meeting of the Persistent Organic Pollutants Review Committee of the Stockholm Convention (POPRC-21)
